title: Lophiolepis handaniae
intro: There is no information available about the plant Lophiolepis handaniae. However, I can provide information about Lophira alata (also known as African Mahogany or White African Mahogany) and Lophira lanceolata (also known as White African Mahogany).
taxonomy: Lophiolepis handaniae is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. However, I couldn't find more specific classification information about Lophiolepis handaniae. The genus Lophiolepis is typically classified as part of the family Polypodiaceae. The family Polypodiaceae is part of the order Polypodiales in the class Polypodiopsida. The class Polypodiopsida is part of the division Pteridophyta.
